# Curator Tools

## Overview

gSage AI — Curator reputation lists (read) tool.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `curator_lists` | Read reputation list data (IPs, domains, hashes) from the Curator microservice | `curator:read` | — | — |
| `curator_manage` | Add, remove, and manage entries in Curator reputation lists and collections | `curator:write` | ✓ | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "base_url": "http://curator:8000"
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_key` | `string` | — | ✓ | — | Curator admin API key (X-API-Key header). |
| `base_url` | `string` | — | — | `"http://curator:8000"` | Curator service base URL (default: http://curator:8000). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_CURATOR__API_KEY` | `api_key` | `string` | — | ✓ | Curator admin API key (X-API-Key header). |
| `TOOL_CURATOR__BASE_URL` | `base_url` | `string` | `"http://curator:8000"` | — | Curator service base URL (default: http://curator:8000). |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `curator_lists`

- **`list_collections`** — list all reputation list collections
- **`view_items`** — query items inside a specific collection (requires collection_id)

### `curator_manage`

- **`add_items`** — add one or more entries to a collection (requires collection_id, items)
- **`del_item`** — remove an entry from a collection (requires collection_id, value, item_type)
- **`create_collection`** — create a new reputation list (requires short_description, collection_type)
- **`update_collection`** — update collection metadata (requires collection_id)

## Permissions required

| Tool | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `curator_lists` | `curator:read` |
| `curator_manage` | `curator:write` |
